{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Captain (Cradle)
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Captain told [[Lindon]] he was free to go.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
